---
title: "model selection illum"
---

```{r}

library(colorEvoHelpers)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(phyr)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
library(performance)
library(MuMIn)
library(buildmer)
library(glmmTMB)
library(splines)
library(sjPlot)
library(ggeffects)
library(brms)
library(sjPlot)

d <- readRDS("_targets/objects/d_sp_cell")
```

```{r}

d$illum_var_sc <- d$illumination_index_sc
d$illum_var_sc <- d$cell_skew_weighted_sc
d$illum_var_sc <- d$mean_prop_bright_outliers_sc
d$illum_var_sc <- d$mean_prop_dark_outliers_sc

l_m2 <- lmer(black_20 ~ ns(cell_lat_sc, 2) * onset_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)
# test if illumination affects latitude relationship
l_m2_illum <- lmer(black_20 ~ ns(cell_lat_sc, 2) * onset_sc + 
                   illum_var_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

l_m2_illum_interact <- lmer(black_20 ~ ns(cell_lat_sc, 2) * onset_sc + 
                            illum_var_sc + 
                            illum_var_sc:cell_lat_sc +
                            (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

# Compare models
lat_illum_comparison <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Base", "With illumination", "With illum x lat interaction"),
  AIC = c(AIC(l_m2), AIC(l_m2_illum), AIC(l_m2_illum_interact))
)
lat_illum_comparison$delta_AIC <- lat_illum_comparison$AIC - min(lat_illum_comparison$AIC)
print(lat_illum_comparison)

# Test significance of illumination
anova(l_m2, l_m2_illum)
anova(l_m2_illum, l_m2_illum_interact)

# Check how coefficients change
coef_change_lat <- data.frame(
  Parameter = names(fixef(l_m2)),
  Original = fixef(l_m2),
  With_Illum = fixef(l_m2_illum)[names(fixef(l_m2))],
  row.names = NULL
)
coef_change_lat$Percent_Change <- 
  (coef_change_lat$With_Illum - coef_change_lat$Original) / 
  abs(coef_change_lat$Original) * 100
print(coef_change_lat)

```

```{r}

# Check raw correlation between illumination and geography
cor.test(d$cell_lat_sc, d$illum_var_sc)
cor.test(d$cell_lon_sc, d$illum_var_sc)

# Visualize the relationship
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(d %>% distinct(cell, .keep_all = TRUE), 
       aes(x = cell_lat_sc, y = illum_var_sc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  labs(title = "Illumination Bias vs Latitude",
       subtitle = "If flat, no geographic pattern")

# Moran's I test for spatial autocorrelation
library(ape)
cell_data <- d %>% distinct(cell, .keep_all = TRUE)
coords <- as.matrix(cell_data[, c("cell_lon", "cell_lat")])
dists <- as.matrix(dist(coords))
dists.inv <- 1/dists
diag(dists.inv) <- 0

Moran.I(cell_data$illum_var_sc, dists.inv)

# Model latitude effect on darkness WITHOUT illumination
m_lat_only <- lmer(black_20 ~ ns(cell_lat_sc, 2) + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

# Model illumination as function of latitude
m_illum_by_lat <- lm(illum_var_sc ~ ns(cell_lat_sc, 2), data = d)
summary(m_illum_by_lat)
plot(ggeffects::ggpredict(m_illum_by_lat, "cell_lat_sc"))

# If significant, the latitude effect might be partially due to illumination

# How much variance in darkness is explained by geography vs illumination?
library(performance)

m1 <- lmer(black_20 ~ (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)
m2 <- lmer(black_20 ~ cell_lat_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)
m3 <- lmer(black_20 ~ illum_var_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)
m4 <- lmer(black_20 ~ cell_lat_sc + illum_var_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

# Compare R² increases
r2_m1 <- r2(m1)
r2_m2 <- r2(m2)
r2_m3 <- r2(m3)
r2_m4 <- r2(m4)

cat("Variance explained by latitude alone:", r2_m2$R2_marginal - r2_m1$R2_marginal, "\n")
cat("Variance explained by illumination alone:", r2_m3$R2_marginal - r2_m1$R2_marginal, "\n")
cat("Additional variance from both:", r2_m4$R2_marginal - r2_m2$R2_marginal, "\n")
```

```{r}

# Add longitude to your models
l_m2_longlat <- lmer(black_20 ~ ns(cell_lat_sc, 2) * onset_sc + 
                     cell_lon_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

# Test if longitude effect is mediated by illumination
l_m2_full <- lmer(black_20 ~ ns(cell_lat_sc, 2) * onset_sc + 
                  cell_lon_sc + illum_var_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

# Compare longitude coefficient with and without illumination

plot(d$cell_lon_sc,d$illum_var_sc)


summary(l_m2_longlat)
summary(l_m2_full)

plot_model(l_m2_longlat)
plot_model(l_m2_full)
```

```{r}

# Create correlation matrix
climate_illum_cors <- cor(d[, c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc", "vp_sc", 
                                 "cell_lon_sc", "illum_var_sc")], 
                          use = "complete.obs")
print(round(climate_illum_cors, 3))

# Test significance of correlations
cor.test(d$tmean_sc, d$illum_var_sc)
cor.test(d$srad_sc, d$illum_var_sc)
cor.test(d$vp_sc, d$illum_var_sc)


```

```{r}

# Step 1: Climate → Darkness (total effect)
m_total <- lmer(black_20 ~ tmean_sc + srad_sc + onset_sc + 
                (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

# Step 2: Climate → Illumination
m_mediator <- lm(illum_var_sc ~ tmean_sc + srad_sc + onset_sc, data = d)

# Step 3: Climate + Illumination → Darkness (direct + indirect effects)
m_direct <- lmer(black_20 ~ tmean_sc + srad_sc + onset_sc + illum_var_sc +
                 (1|species) + (1|cell), data = d)

# Compare coefficients
mediation_test <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc"),
  Total_Effect = fixef(m_total)[c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc")],
  Direct_Effect = fixef(m_direct)[c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc")],
  Percent_Mediated = NA
)
mediation_test$Percent_Mediated <- 
  (mediation_test$Total_Effect - mediation_test$Direct_Effect) / 
  mediation_test$Total_Effect * 100

print(mediation_test)
```

```{r}

# Function to test confounding systematically
test_confounding <- function(data, climate_var) {
  # Model 1: Climate only
  f1 <- as.formula(paste0("black_20 ~ ns(", climate_var, ", 2) * onset_sc + ",
                          "(1|species) + (1|cell)"))
  m1 <- lmer(f1, data = data)
  
  # Model 2: Climate + Illumination
  f2 <- as.formula(paste0("black_20 ~ ns(", climate_var, ", 2) * onset_sc + ",
                          "illum_var_sc + (1|species) + (1|cell)"))
  m2 <- lmer(f2, data = data)
  
  # Model 3: Climate + Illumination + Interaction
  f3 <- as.formula(paste0("black_20 ~ ns(", climate_var, ", 2) * onset_sc + ",
                          "illum_var_sc + ns(", climate_var, ", 2):illum_var_sc + ",
                          "(1|species) + (1|cell)"))
  m3 <- lmer(f3, data = data)
  
  # Extract climate effects
  get_climate_effect <- function(model) {
    coefs <- fixef(model)
    # Get the linear component of the spline
    coefs[grep(paste0("ns\\(", climate_var, ".*1"), names(coefs))][1]
  }
  
  result <- data.frame(
    Climate_Var = climate_var,
    Effect_Alone = get_climate_effect(m1),
    Effect_With_Illum = get_climate_effect(m2),
    Effect_With_Interaction = get_climate_effect(m3),
    AIC_Alone = AIC(m1),
    AIC_With_Illum = AIC(m2),
    AIC_With_Interaction = AIC(m3)
  )
  
  result$Percent_Change <- (result$Effect_With_Illum - result$Effect_Alone) / 
                           abs(result$Effect_Alone) * 100
  
  result$Confounding_Evidence <- case_when(
    abs(result$Percent_Change) > 20 ~ "Strong",
    abs(result$Percent_Change) > 10 ~ "Moderate", 
    abs(result$Percent_Change) > 5 ~ "Weak",
    TRUE ~ "Negligible"
  )
  
  return(list(summary = result, models = list(m1 = m1, m2 = m2, m3 = m3)))
}

# Test each climate variable
tmean_test <- test_confounding(d, "tmean_sc")
srad_test <- test_confounding(d, "srad_sc")
vp_test <- test_confounding(d, "vp_sc")

# Combine results
confounding_summary <- rbind(tmean_test$summary, srad_test$summary, vp_test$summary)
print(confounding_summary)
```

```{r}

# Enhanced buildmer function with illumination option
myBuildmerWithIllum <- function(climate_vars = c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc"), 
                                 data,
                                 illum_vars = NULL,
                                 vifs = TRUE,
                                 return_model = TRUE) {
  d <- data
  
  # Ensure needed packages
  if (!requireNamespace("splines", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'splines' is required but not installed.")
  }
  if (!requireNamespace("sjPlot", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'sjPlot' is required but not installed.")
  }
  
  # 1. Build spline term strings
  spline_terms <- paste0("ns(", climate_vars, ", 2)")
  
  # 2. Assemble fixed‐effect RHS
  if (!is.null(illum_vars)) {
    climate_onset_parts <- c("onset_sc", spline_terms)
    rhs <- paste0("(", paste(climate_onset_parts, collapse = " + "), ")^2 + ",
                  paste(illum_vars, collapse = " + "))
  } else {
    fixed_parts <- c("onset_sc", spline_terms)
    rhs <- paste0("(", paste(fixed_parts, collapse = " + "), ")^2")
  }
  
  # 3. Full formula with random effects
  full_formula <- as.formula(paste(
    "black_20 ~",
    rhs,
    "+ (1 | species) + (1 | cell)"
  ))
  
  # 4. Build 'include' list for splines
  include_list <- setNames(
    lapply(spline_terms, function(term) {
      paste0(term, 1:2)
    }),
    spline_terms
  )
  
  # 5. Fit with buildglmmTMB
  m_build <- buildglmmTMB(
    full_formula,
    data = d,
    family = gaussian(),
    buildmerControl = buildmerControl(
      direction = "backward",
      include = include_list,
      crit = "AIC",
      elim = "AIC"
    )
  )
  print(summary(m_build@model))
  
  # 6. Quick lmer for collinearity check
  test_formula <- as.formula(
    paste0("black_20 ~ ", paste(climate_vars, collapse = " + "), 
           " + (1 | species) + (1 | cell)")
  )
  test_mod <- lme4::lmer(test_formula, data = d)
  
  if(vifs){
    # 7. Compute & print VIFs
    vif_vals <- car::vif(test_mod)
    message("VIFs for climate predictors in simple lmer:\n")
    print(vif_vals) 
  }
  if(return_model){
    return(m_build@model)
  }
  return(m_build)
}

```

```{r}

# Comprehensive comparison function (FIXED)
compare_illumination_effect <- function(base_model, illum_model, model_name) {
  
  # AIC comparison
  aic_improve <- AIC(base_model) - AIC(illum_model)
  
  # Get coefficients
  base_coef <- fixef(base_model)
  illum_coef <- fixef(illum_model)
  
  # Find matching coefficients (excluding illumination term itself)
  common_names <- intersect(names(base_coef), names(illum_coef))
  
  # Make sure we have numeric values
  base_vals <- as.numeric(base_coef[common_names])
  illum_vals <- as.numeric(illum_coef[common_names])
  
  # Calculate changes only for common coefficients
  if(length(common_names) > 0) {
    coef_changes <- data.frame(
      Model = model_name,
      Parameter = common_names,
      Base = base_vals,
      With_Illum = illum_vals,
      Percent_Change = (illum_vals - base_vals) / abs(base_vals) * 100,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    # Handle cases where base value is 0
    coef_changes$Percent_Change[is.infinite(coef_changes$Percent_Change)] <- NA
  } else {
    coef_changes <- data.frame(
      Model = character(),
      Parameter = character(),
      Base = numeric(),
      With_Illum = numeric(),
      Percent_Change = numeric()
    )
  }
  
  # R-squared comparison
  r2_base <- MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(base_model)
  r2_illum <- MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(illum_model)
  
  # Also report the illumination coefficient if it exists
  illum_effect <- NULL
  illum_term_names <- grep("illumination", names(illum_coef), value = TRUE)
  if(length(illum_term_names) > 0) {
    illum_effect <- data.frame(
      Parameter = illum_term_names,
      Estimate = as.numeric(illum_coef[illum_term_names]),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  list(
    model_name = model_name,
    aic_improvement = aic_improve,
    coef_changes = coef_changes,
    illumination_effects = illum_effect,
    r2_change = data.frame(
      Marginal_Base = r2_base[1, 1],
      Marginal_Illum = r2_illum[1, 1],
      Conditional_Base = r2_base[1, 2],
      Conditional_Illum = r2_illum[1, 2]
    )
  )
}

# Fit base climate models without illumination
m1_build <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc"), data = d, return_model = FALSE)
m1 <- m1_build@model

m2_build <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("tmean_sc", "vp_sc"), data = d, return_model = FALSE)
m2 <- m2_build@model

m3_build <- myBuildmer(climate_vars = c("srad_sc", "vp_sc"), data = d, return_model = FALSE)
m3 <- m3_build@model

# Fit climate models WITH illumination
m1_illum_build <- myBuildmerWithIllum(climate_vars = c("tmean_sc", "srad_sc"), 
                                       data = d, 
                                       illum_vars = "illumination_index",
                                       return_model = FALSE)
m1_illum <- m1_illum_build@model

m2_illum_build <- myBuildmerWithIllum(climate_vars = c("tmean_sc", "vp_sc"), 
                                       data = d,
                                       illum_vars = "illumination_index",
                                       return_model = FALSE)
m2_illum <- m2_illum_build@model

m3_illum_build <- myBuildmerWithIllum(climate_vars = c("srad_sc", "vp_sc"), 
                                       data = d,
                                       illum_vars = "illumination_index",
                                       return_model = FALSE)
m3_illum <- m3_illum_build@model

summary(m1)
summary(m1_illum)
AIC(m1)
AIC(m1_illum)

plot_model(m1_illum)
summary(m1)
summary(m1_illum)
AIC(m1)
AIC(m1_illum)

# Compare all models
m1_comparison <- compare_illumination_effect(m1, m1_illum, "tmean_srad")
m2_comparison <- compare_illumination_effect(m2, m2_illum, "tmean_vp")
m3_comparison <- compare_illumination_effect(m3, m3_illum, "srad_vp")

# Summary table with better error handling
illum_summary <- data.frame(
  Model = c("tmean_srad", "tmean_vp", "srad_vp"),
  AIC_Improvement = c(m1_comparison$aic_improvement, 
                      m2_comparison$aic_improvement,
                      m3_comparison$aic_improvement),
  Max_Coef_Change = c(
    ifelse(nrow(m1_comparison$coef_changes) > 0, 
           max(abs(m1_comparison$coef_changes$Percent_Change), na.rm = TRUE), 
           NA),
    ifelse(nrow(m2_comparison$coef_changes) > 0,
           max(abs(m2_comparison$coef_changes$Percent_Change), na.rm = TRUE),
           NA),
    ifelse(nrow(m3_comparison$coef_changes) > 0,
           max(abs(m3_comparison$coef_changes$Percent_Change), na.rm = TRUE),
           NA)
  )
)
print(illum_summary)

# Also print illumination effects
cat("\n=== Illumination Coefficient Estimates ===\n")
print(m1_comparison$illumination_effects)
print(m2_comparison$illumination_effects)
print(m3_comparison$illumination_effects)

# Print detailed coefficient changes for investigation
cat("\n=== Detailed Coefficient Changes ===\n")
cat("\nModel 1 (tmean + srad):\n")
print(m1_comparison$coef_changes)
cat("\nModel 2 (tmean + vp):\n")
print(m2_comparison$coef_changes)
cat("\nModel 3 (srad + vp):\n")
print(m3_comparison$coef_changes)

# R-squared changes
cat("\n=== R-squared Changes ===\n")
r2_summary <- rbind(
  cbind(Model = "tmean_srad", m1_comparison$r2_change),
  cbind(Model = "tmean_vp", m2_comparison$r2_change),
  cbind(Model = "srad_vp", m3_comparison$r2_change)
)
print(r2_summary)
```

```

```{r}

# Example visualization code (not in targets)
library(ggplot2)

# Using Option 1:
lightness_distributions %>%
  filter(species %in% c("Species1", "Species2")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lightness, fill = species)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~paste(species, cell, sep = " - "))
```
